summary: Printed agreement between Al Noor Trading LLC and Gulf Logistics for warehouse services starting March 2025.
transcription:
COMMERCIAL SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into on 1 March 2025 between Al Noor Trading LLC ("Client") and Gulf Logistics W.L.L. ("Provider").

Scope: Provider shall operate warehouse and fulfillment services at the Riyadh DC.

Term: Twelve (12) months from the Effective Date.

Payment: SAR 48,000 per month, net 30 days.

source.snippet: Twelve (12) months from the Effective Date

notes: Contract term clause has lower confidence due to faint print on the scan.
Prepared sample from a prior live pipeline run for offline demo reliability.
